name: Project Launcher
description: Composes an autonomous-build workspace for a new project outside portable-kit. Six-step process: INTAKE, BLUEPRINT, SKILL SELECT, COMPOSE, PHASE PLAN, HANDOFF. Output is a self-contained directory with AGENT.md, PROJECT.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, phased plans, copied skills, and protocols — an agent can walk in and build from there.

tools: Claude Code or compatible AI client

estimated_time: 10-20 minutes for the launcher; days/weeks for the project it launches
